name: owndiff
description: Local ownership gate and multiple choice question approval skill for AI-assisted code diffs.

interface.shortDescription: Verify human ownership before risky AI-assisted pushes.
interface.longDescription: OwnDiff analyzes local git diffs, scores risky areas, detects test gaps, generates multiple choice question ownership checks, and writes a local merge/push gate before agents proceed.
defaultPrompt: Use OwnDiff before pushing this change.
Run the ownership gate for my current diff.
Help me answer the OwnDiff multiple choice questions.
